reasoning: Silhouette is unambiguous — clearly a square button at all scales. Pixel art execution is clean and grid-aligned with no muddiness. However it fails the charm test: the face expression is stoic/blank (flat mouth, symmetrical dots), reading more as a mechanical wall-socket than a friendly toy character. Shape is boxy/hard-cornered — the opposite of the round-soft vocabulary Echoes of Wisdom uses for its Echo icons. On the light background the beige face area merges with white, reducing visibility. At 1x the face features are a barely-perceptible smudge, so personality is lost at shipping size. Clear-but-charmless — passes silhouette, fails charm.
